Metadata.title: MedChain Library | Blockchain Medical Literature Platform
Metadata.description: Blockchain-based medical literature and academic development platform. Immutable scientific records, transparent peer review, and academic wallet.

Dashboard.title: Academic Wallet
Dashboard.subtitle: Your academic identity and blockchain-based learning proofs

Landing.hero_subtitle: The world's first blockchain-based healthcare literature consensus network. The tamper-proof Web3 evolution of PubMed, ResearchGate, and Zotero. We encrypt scientific truths for the future.

vision.p1: The world of medical research wastes billions of dollars every year due to opaque peer review processes and unverified citation chains.
vision.p2: MedChain is trust encoded. We believe that scientific data should have an unalterable destiny from its birth.
vision.headline: Scientific Consensus Network of the Future
vision.feat1_desc: Once data is written to the chain, no power in the world can change or delete it.
vision.feat2_desc: Not just publication count; verified reviews and open data sharing turn into value in your Academic Wallet.
vision.feat3_desc: A borderless, uncensorable global network of reviewers and researchers.

Landing.feature1_desc: Scientific records hashed and anchored to global mainnets indefinitely.
Landing.feature2_desc: Every citation forms a cryptographically verified node in the truth hierarchy.
Landing.feature3_desc: Zero-knowledge proof systems ensure reviewer anonymity with total accountability.

modal.title: Change Log
modal.subtitle: Old versions are not deleted — entire history is preserved on blockchain
modal.author: Author
modal.footer: All versions are stored immutably on the blockchain

PeerReview.title: Transparent Peer Review Panel
PeerReview.subtitle: Verifiable and manipulation-resistant peer review processes

how_it_works.title: How Transparent Peer Review Works?
how_it_works.description: Every peer review evaluation is recorded on the blockchain. Reviewers' identities, institutions, and review timestamps are transparently visible. This prevents manipulations such as fake peer review and citation farming.

PeerReview.footer: All peer review evaluations are recorded transparently and immutably on the blockchain

Citations.title: Citation Chain Visualization
Citations.subtitle: Scientific pedigree and the evolution of knowledge
Citations.info_alert: This visualization step by step shows the evolution of knowledge from {trial} back to {foundational}. Each node represents a verified record on the blockchain.

Guidelines.title: Living Guidelines
Guidelines.subtitle: Immutable up-to-date versions of clinical guidelines

change_log.title: Change Log
change_log.footer: All update logs are immutably preserved on the blockchain
